chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-351 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 10.09.2025. Mr. Sandeep Kumar Maheshwari, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Muhammad Saleh Ansari, District Accounts Officer, Mirpurkhas. In compliance of order dated 03.09.2025 passed by this Court, the Respondent No.3 has submitted compliance report showing release of funds and placed the same at the disposal of Administrative Department i.e. Population Welfare Department, Govt of Sindh for Financial Assistance to the families of deceased Government servants, who expired during service. District Accounts Officer, Mirpurkhas present in Court submits that the funds would be released to the Petitioner after completing legal formalities. Counsel present on behalf of Petitioner submits that he would be satisfied if the Petitioner’s grievance is resolved and funds would be released. In view of above circumstances, the Petition in hand is disposed of with directions to District Accounts Officer, Mirpurkhas to release the funds to the Petitioner after completing all codal formalities upon proper verification and identification by adopting all the rules & regulations within two months. However, the Petitioner is also directed to co-operate with the District Accounts Officer regarding submission of documents, if any, required. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
